heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers and thunderstorms likely early, then decreasing overnight. Lows in the low to mid 60s, some upper 60s in the Champlain Valley. Winds becoming light and variable, except south 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Thursday
text: Variable clouds. Widely scattered showers and thunderstorms, mainly in the afternoon. Highs in the mid to upper 80s, some lower 80s far north. West to southwest winds around 5 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Widely scattered evening showers or a thunderstorm, diminishing overnight. Lows in the mid to upper 60s, some lower 60s northeast, and around 70 in the Champlain Valley. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys, becoming light and variable elsewhere.
